docs.name: Pen Cursor
docs.description: Physics-driven ribbon trail rendered on canvas — a chain of linked points follows the mouse with spring-damping inertia, width scales with speed, and colors interpolate head-to-tail. Inspired by obsidianassembly.com.

props.name: trailLength
props.description: Number of chain-linked trail points. Default 60.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum ribbon width in px (scales with speed). Default 1.

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Minimum ribbon width in px at the tail. Default 1.

props.name: damping
props.description: Spring damping for the head point (0–1). Default 0.6.

props.name: speedInfluence
props.description: How much mouse speed widens the ribbon (0–1). Default 0.9.

props.name: colorHead
props.description: RGB string for the ribbon head color. Default "159, 175, 155" (sage green).

props.name: colorTail
props.description: RGB string for the ribbon tail color. Default "198, 167, 106" (warm gold).

props.name: alphaHead
props.description: Opacity at the ribbon head (0–1). Default 0.9.

props.name: alphaTail
props.description: Opacity at the ribbon tail (0–1). Default 0.

props.name: hideSystemCursor
props.description: Hide the system cursor while mounted. Default false.

props.name: containerRef
props.description: Optional. Limits drawing to this element; parent should be `relative`. Omit for full-window tracking.

props.name: className
props.description: Extra classes on the canvas element.

docs.overview: PenCursor draws a ribbon-like ink trail that follows the mouse with spring-driven inertia, tapering from a thick head to a thin tail. Renders on a fullscreen canvas overlay positioned above page content.

scenarios.title: Creative portfolio cursor
scenarios.description: Add a painterly ink ribbon cursor to a design or illustration portfolio to reinforce the creative brand.

scenarios.title: Handwriting effect on a landing page
scenarios.description: Use a thin, fast trail to simulate a ballpoint pen writing across the screen as users navigate.
